records.m_Talk_ENG: Errgh...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Errgh...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Errgh...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ngh... Kgh...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ngh... Kgh...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ngh... Kgh...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kuh! I can't go on any further. How are you this heavy?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kuh! I can't go on any further. How are you this heavy?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kuh! I can't go on any further. How are you this heavy?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I thought it'd be easier if I moved you by cart, but this is harder than I thought.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I thought it'd be easier if I moved you by cart, but this is harder than I thought.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I thought it'd be easier if I moved you by cart, but this is harder than I thought.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Is my only choice to throw out the junk? Hmm...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Is my only choice to throw out the junk? Hmm...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Is my only choice to throw out the junk? Hmm...

records.m_Talk_ENG: If I'm too heavy, you can just leave me here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If I'm too heavy, you can just leave me here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If I'm too heavy, you can just leave me here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: How can I leave someone who's alive and well out here?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: How can I leave someone who's alive and well out here?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: How can I leave someone who's alive and well out here?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: So I'm alive in your eyes, huh...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So I'm alive in your eyes, huh...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So I'm alive in your eyes, huh...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Of course.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Of course.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Of course.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh! I'm gonna be sore all over my body tomorrow...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh! I'm gonna be sore all over my body tomorrow...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh! I'm gonna be sore all over my body tomorrow...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Let's rest for a bit. I'm going to park it here, are you all right with that?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Let's rest for a bit. I'm going to park it here, are you all right with that?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Let's rest for a bit. I'm going to park it here, are you all right with that?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Where are you taking me?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Where are you taking me?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Where are you taking me?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Could you stop being so cautious around me? It makes me feel like I'm doing something bad.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Could you stop being so cautious around me? It makes me feel like I'm doing something bad.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Could you stop being so cautious around me? It makes me feel like I'm doing something bad.

records.m_Talk_ENG: First of all, I'm going to take you to my place. Then, I'm going to keep trying to fix you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: First of all, I'm going to take you to my place. Then, I'm going to keep trying to fix you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: First of all, I'm going to take you to my place. Then, I'm going to keep trying to fix you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Since you were able to move for a second, I think I can get you all better if I put in a little more elbow grease.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Since you were able to move for a second, I think I can get you all better if I put in a little more elbow grease.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Since you were able to move for a second, I think I can get you all better if I put in a little more elbow grease.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm grateful that you saved me, but you don't have to keep being nice to me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm grateful that you saved me, but you don't have to keep being nice to me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm grateful that you saved me, but you don't have to keep being nice to me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But I can't just leave a person in trouble alone.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But I can't just leave a person in trouble alone.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But I can't just leave a person in trouble alone.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I at least know that you won't hurt me, so you're free to do whatever you please after I fix you up.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I at least know that you won't hurt me, so you're free to do whatever you please after I fix you up.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I at least know that you won't hurt me, so you're free to do whatever you please after I fix you up.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You see, I can't just leave you like this.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You see, I can't just leave you like this.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You see, I can't just leave you like this.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Because good kids like you have all died.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Because good kids like you have all died.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Because good kids like you have all died.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm? Did you say something?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm? Did you say something?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm? Did you say something?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Nothing.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Nothing.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Nothing.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Phew... Guess we still have a long way to go.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Phew... Guess we still have a long way to go.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Phew... Guess we still have a long way to go.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But as long as we don't come across a C.O., we might make it back in a few hours.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But as long as we don't come across a C.O., we might make it back in a few hours.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But as long as we don't come across a C.O., we might make it back in a few hours.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Aren't you hungry? I have some leftover sandwiches. Do you want some?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Aren't you hungry? I have some leftover sandwiches. Do you want some?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Aren't you hungry? I have some leftover sandwiches. Do you want some?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I can't eat food.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I can't eat food.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I can't eat food.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, I get it. Then could you open your mouth for me?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, I get it. Then could you open your mouth for me?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, I get it. Then could you open your mouth for me?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kgh! Stop trying to shove it down my mouth...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kgh! Stop trying to shove it down my mouth...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kgh! Stop trying to shove it down my mouth...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I didn't mean that I can't eat it by myself.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I didn't mean that I can't eat it by myself.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I didn't mean that I can't eat it by myself.

records.m_Talk_ENG: O-oh... Sorry.
records.m_Talk_DEU: O-oh... Sorry.
records.m_Talk_FRA: O-oh... Sorry.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You'd better eat fast. It's dangerous out here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You'd better eat fast. It's dangerous out here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You'd better eat fast. It's dangerous out here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Okay. Then, could you give me a minute?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Okay. Then, could you give me a minute?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Okay. Then, could you give me a minute?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Can't believe you're eating and reading a book in a Corrupted Area...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Can't believe you're eating and reading a book in a Corrupted Area...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Can't believe you're eating and reading a book in a Corrupted Area...

records.m_Talk_ENG: A C.O. might jump us at any moment, but you're so carefree.
records.m_Talk_DEU: A C.O. might jump us at any moment, but you're so carefree.
records.m_Talk_FRA: A C.O. might jump us at any moment, but you're so carefree.

records.m_Talk_ENG: From the looks of it, you've done this a couple of times, haven't you? Why are you even out here?
records.m_Talk_DEU: From the looks of it, you've done this a couple of times, haven't you? Why are you even out here?
records.m_Talk_FRA: From the looks of it, you've done this a couple of times, haven't you? Why are you even out here?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why were you rummaging this place? For whom?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why were you rummaging this place? For whom?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why were you rummaging this place? For whom?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, are you even listening to me?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey, are you even listening to me?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey, are you even listening to me?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm? What did you say?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm? What did you say?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm? What did you say?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Never mind.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Never mind.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Never mind.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hehehe. Sorry about that.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hehehe. Sorry about that.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hehehe. Sorry about that.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I tend to tune out everything when I'm reading comics.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I tend to tune out everything when I'm reading comics.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I tend to tune out everything when I'm reading comics.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oof. Even trying to eat food is a pain in the butt...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oof. Even trying to eat food is a pain in the butt...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oof. Even trying to eat food is a pain in the butt...

records.m_Talk_ENG: This sandwich has herring in it, so it's not that tasty, but there's also nothing like it for emergency rations.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This sandwich has herring in it, so it's not that tasty, but there's also nothing like it for emergency rations.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This sandwich has herring in it, so it's not that tasty, but there's also nothing like it for emergency rations.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I need to focus all my imagination about eating something delicious whenever I take a bite, which is tiring.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I need to focus all my imagination about eating something delicious whenever I take a bite, which is tiring.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I need to focus all my imagination about eating something delicious whenever I take a bite, which is tiring.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And you're leisurely reading a comic in the middle of a Corrupted Area?
records.m_Talk_DEU: And you're leisurely reading a comic in the middle of a Corrupted Area?
records.m_Talk_FRA: And you're leisurely reading a comic in the middle of a Corrupted Area?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Talk about safety frigidity.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Talk about safety frigidity.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Talk about safety frigidity.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But I want to know what happens next. I can't help but be curious.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But I want to know what happens next. I can't help but be curious.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But I want to know what happens next. I can't help but be curious.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh! Lieutenant Colonel Andreas is awesome as always...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh! Lieutenant Colonel Andreas is awesome as always...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh! Lieutenant Colonel Andreas is awesome as always...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Whew! I'm full! Shall we get going now?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Whew! I'm full! Shall we get going now?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Whew! I'm full! Shall we get going now?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Let's do this! Hmph...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Let's do this! Hmph...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Let's do this! Hmph...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Have you been always pulling this cart?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Have you been always pulling this cart?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Have you been always pulling this cart?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yup. It would've been more comfortable if I had a truck, but I'm terrible at driving.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yup. It would've been more comfortable if I had a truck, but I'm terrible at driving.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yup. It would've been more comfortable if I had a truck, but I'm terrible at driving.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I did borrow Boris' car once, but...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I did borrow Boris' car once, but...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I did borrow Boris' car once, but...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I crashed it as soon as I started the car, and there was a big fuss. Hehehe...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I crashed it as soon as I started the car, and there was a big fuss. Hehehe...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I crashed it as soon as I started the car, and there was a big fuss. Hehehe...

records.m_Talk_ENG: You were so quiet before...
records.m_Talk_DEU: You were so quiet before...
records.m_Talk_FRA: You were so quiet before...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you the type that gets friendly after spending some time with someone?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are you the type that gets friendly after spending some time with someone?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you the type that gets friendly after spending some time with someone?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I-I was just trying to figure out what kind of person you were.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I-I was just trying to figure out what kind of person you were.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I-I was just trying to figure out what kind of person you were.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hehe, then you should've told me that. Did you want to get to know me that much?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hehe, then you should've told me that. Did you want to get to know me that much?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hehe, then you should've told me that. Did you want to get to know me that much?

records.m_Talk_ENG: My hobbies are turning trash into useful tools, reading "Charge! Town Soldiers of Bremen," and...

records.m_Talk_FRA: My hobbies are turning trash into useful tools, reading "Charge! Town Soldiers of Bremen," and...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm...

records.m_Talk_DEU: This? It's a radar that detects C.O.s that are nearby.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This? It's a radar that detects C.O.s that are nearby.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's not as good as the original, but there's nothing more useful right now.

records.m_Talk_FRA: It's not as good as the original, but there's nothing more useful right now.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I didn't ask...

records.m_Talk_FRA: I didn't ask...

root.m_Talk_FRA: Kgh! Stop trying to shove it down my mouth...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I didn't mean that I can't eat it by myself.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I didn't mean that I can't eat it by myself.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I didn't mean that I can't eat it by myself.

root.m_Talk_ENG: O-oh... Sorry.
root.m_Talk_DEU: O-oh... Sorry.
root.m_Talk_FRA: O-oh... Sorry.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You'd better eat fast. It's dangerous out here.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You'd better eat fast. It's dangerous out here.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You'd better eat fast. It's dangerous out here.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Okay. Then, could you give me a minute?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Okay. Then, could you give me a minute?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Okay. Then, could you give me a minute?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Can't believe you're eating and reading a book in a Corrupted Area...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Can't believe you're eating and reading a book in a Corrupted Area...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Can't believe you're eating and reading a book in a Corrupted Area...

root.m_Talk_ENG: A C.O. might jump us at any moment, but you're so carefree.
root.m_Talk_DEU: A C.O. might jump us at any moment, but you're so carefree.
root.m_Talk_FRA: A C.O. might jump us at any moment, but you're so carefree.

root.m_Talk_ENG: From the looks of it, you've done this a couple of times, haven't you? Why are you even out here?
root.m_Talk_DEU: From the looks of it, you've done this a couple of times, haven't you? Why are you even out here?
root.m_Talk_FRA: From the looks of it, you've done this a couple of times, haven't you? Why are you even out here?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Why were you rummaging this place? For whom?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Why were you rummaging this place? For whom?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Why were you rummaging this place? For whom?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, are you even listening to me?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hey, are you even listening to me?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hey, are you even listening to me?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm? What did you say?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm? What did you say?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm? What did you say?

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Never mind.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Never mind.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Never mind.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hehehe. Sorry about that.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hehehe. Sorry about that.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hehehe. Sorry about that.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I tend to tune out everything when I'm reading comics.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I tend to tune out everything when I'm reading comics.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I tend to tune out everything when I'm reading comics.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oof. Even trying to eat food is a pain in the butt...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oof. Even trying to eat food is a pain in the butt...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oof. Even trying to eat food is a pain in the butt...

root.m_Talk_ENG: This sandwich has herring in it, so it's not that tasty, but there's also nothing like it for emergency rations.
root.m_Talk_DEU: This sandwich has herring in it, so it's not that tasty, but there's also nothing like it for emergency rations.
root.m_Talk_FRA: This sandwich has herring in it, so it's not that tasty, but there's also nothing like it for emergency rations.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I need to focus all my imagination about eating something delicious whenever I take a bite, which is tiring.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I need to focus all my imagination about eating something delicious whenever I take a bite, which is tiring.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I need to focus all my imagination about eating something delicious whenever I take a bite, which is tiring.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And you're leisurely reading a comic in the middle of a Corrupted Area?
root.m_Talk_DEU: And you're leisurely reading a comic in the middle of a Corrupted Area?
root.m_Talk_FRA: And you're leisurely reading a comic in the middle of a Corrupted Area?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Talk about safety frigidity.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Talk about safety frigidity.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Talk about safety frigidity.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But I want to know what happens next. I can't help but be curious.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But I want to know what happens next. I can't help but be curious.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But I want to know what happens next. I can't help but be curious.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh! Lieutenant Colonel Andreas is awesome as always...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh! Lieutenant Colonel Andreas is awesome as always...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh! Lieutenant Colonel Andreas is awesome as always...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Whew! I'm full! Shall we get going now?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Whew! I'm full! Shall we get going now?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Whew! I'm full! Shall we get going now?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Let's do this! Hmph...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Let's do this! Hmph...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Let's do this! Hmph...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Have you been always pulling this cart?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Have you been always pulling this cart?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Have you been always pulling this cart?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yup. It would've been more comfortable if I had a truck, but I'm terrible at driving.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yup. It would've been more comfortable if I had a truck, but I'm terrible at driving.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yup. It would've been more comfortable if I had a truck, but I'm terrible at driving.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I did borrow Boris' car once, but...
root.m_Talk_DEU: I did borrow Boris' car once, but...
root.m_Talk_FRA: I did borrow Boris' car once, but...

root.m_Talk_ENG: I crashed it as soon as I started the car, and there was a big fuss. Hehehe...
root.m_Talk_DEU: I crashed it as soon as I started the car, and there was a big fuss. Hehehe...
root.m_Talk_FRA: I crashed it as soon as I started the car, and there was a big fuss. Hehehe...

root.m_Talk_ENG: You were so quiet before...
root.m_Talk_DEU: You were so quiet before...
root.m_Talk_FRA: You were so quiet before...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Are you the type that gets friendly after spending some time with someone?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Are you the type that gets friendly after spending some time with someone?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Are you the type that gets friendly after spending some time with someone?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I-I was just trying to figure out what kind of person you were.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I-I was just trying to figure out what kind of person you were.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I-I was just trying to figure out what kind of person you were.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hehe, then you should've told me that. Did you want to get to know me that much?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hehe, then you should've told me that. Did you want to get to know me that much?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hehe, then you should've told me that. Did you want to get to know me that much?

root.m_Talk_ENG: My hobbies are turning trash into useful tools, reading "Charge! Town Soldiers of Bremen," and...
root.m_Talk_DEU: My hobbies are turning trash into useful tools, reading "Charge! Town Soldiers of Bremen," and...
root.m_Talk_FRA: My hobbies are turning trash into useful tools, reading "Charge! Town Soldiers of Bremen," and...

root.m_Talk_FRA: *Sigh*

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm...

root.m_Talk_ENG: This? It's a radar that detects C.O.s that are nearby.
root.m_Talk_DEU: This? It's a radar that detects C.O.s that are nearby.
root.m_Talk_FRA: This? It's a radar that detects C.O.s that are nearby.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's not as good as the original, but there's nothing more useful right now.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's not as good as the original, but there's nothing more useful right now.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's not as good as the original, but there's nothing more useful right now.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I didn't ask...
root.m_Talk_DEU: I didn't ask...
root.m_Talk_FRA: I didn't ask...

root.m_Talk_FRA: It normally lights up blue, and doesn't really react to anything, but!
